case_skeleton: Patient with hypertensive urgency and mild dyspnea under inpatient monitoring. with recent transfer between service lines. Encounter nuance profile 9.
care_plan: Trend troponins, control blood pressure, and document evidence-based discharge criteria. Operational focus: prioritize adverse-event visibility in discharge text.
